applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: golden: def _golden_function(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b, *args, activations=None, **kwargs): output_tensor = input_tensor_a - input_tensor_b; return apply_activations(output_tensor, activations); fusion_notes: Supports fused unary activations on the output via the 'activations' kwarg (torch pattern: act(a - b)). Common model-level chain at call sites is classifier-free guidance: text = (text - uncond) * scale; out = uncond + text, expressed as ttnn.sub_ -> ttnn.mul_ -> ttnn.add/add_, all in-place where possible.; constraints: {'in_place': True, 'output_aliases': 'input_tensor_a', 'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT required in observed tests'}
